title: Entadopsis nana
taxonomy: Entadopsis nana is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae, commonly known as the legume family. It belongs to the genus Entadopsis, which is a group of tropical to subtropical flowering plants. Further classification places Entadopsis nana within the subfamily Faboideae, a large and diverse group of legume plants.
